room.caption: [NH2] Second Floor

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1056 newMapY=175 toRoom=rExtGateH_1 image_xscale=6 y+=16 newArrowPosX=40 newArrowPosY=16
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=64 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_4 newArrowPosX=-8 x+=8
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=416 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_5 newArrowPosX=8 x-=8
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1136 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_3 image_xscale=14 newArrowPosX=96 newArrowPosY=48

GID_SET(428282, self.id) noteType=0 noteToRead="Only when all the desk lamps in the house are on will you be able to return to your room.
The lights at the stairwell, they are your clue to the lamps.
-?????"
if global.gateHProg<=6 {y+=256} else if global.gateHProg>=8 {instance_destroy()}
